originalTitle: Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
summary: The spy scandal has revived fears that Austria remains a hotbed of Russian espionage activity.
content: The spy scandal has revived fears that Austria remains a hotbed of Russian espionage activity.
chineseTitle: 奥地利前情报官员被判犯有俄罗斯间谍罪
chineseSummary: 间谍丑闻再次引发人们对奥地利仍然是俄罗斯间谍活动温床的担忧。
chineseContent: 间谍丑闻再次引发人们对奥地利仍然是俄罗斯间谍活动温床的担忧。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
